# Overview

## Task list 

* Detection limits
* Inter-series variability
    - quantify variability
    - correction equations ?
* Sample beginning position: where do you place x-axis origin?
    - Compile the Cu wire distance measurement data into the database
    - establish the sample origin point from Cu wire distance: Cu signal, Cd signal, Pb signal, Density signal
    - establish the sample origin from correlating iTrax data to LA-ICPMS
    - Establish a method to determine the sample origin from density data alone
* iTrax resolution
    - Copper wire tests to assess the integrated volume of sample along the X-axis
    - Tests to assess the integrated sample volume depth
    - Tests to assess the integrated volume of sample along the y-axis ?
